stemHtml: An aircraft accelerates towards the transonic speed region. What happens to CLMAX and critical angle of attack?

options.a: CLMAX will decrease and the critical angle of attack will increase.
options.b: CLMAX will increase and the critical angle of attack will decrease.
options.c: CLMAX will increase and the critical angle of attack will increase.
options.d: CLMAX will decrease and the critical angle of attack will decrease.
